name: FastAPI /compute endpoint end-to-end integration
description: Integration test: use FastAPI test client to POST to /compute with valid ComputeRequest JSON and assert HTTP response and body mapping to orchestrator result. Verifies compute_endpoint wiring, Pydantic validation, and JSONResponse behavior.
output: HTTP 200 response with JSON body containing success True and structured_json.result equal to 4.0
success_criteria: Response body is JSON and contains 'success': True
No unhandled exceptions and compute_endpoint returns the orchestrator payload
error_scenarios: 422 Unprocessable Entity if request body fails ComputeRequest validation
500 Internal server error if orchestrator.process raises unexpected exception
